history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt, white loose-fitting pants, and light blue and white sneakers, sits on a grey sofa. He is holding a black smartphone in his right hand and is adjusting a black baseball cap on his head with his left hand. The cap has white lettering and pink stars, with the word "Dance" visible. A black zip-up hoodie with intricate white, sparkly embellishments, possibly rhinestones or beads, is draped over the sofa next to him. The hoodie has a design that appears to be a stylized snake or dragon. The background is a plain white wall. There are two round white tables in the foreground, one on the left and a partial view of another on the right. The lighting is bright and even, creating a clean and modern aesthetic. The overall mood is casual and relaxed, with a hint of streetwear style. The color palette is dominated by white, grey, black, and light blue.
